items.title: Smart & Final: Get $15 Shopping Credit With $100 Giftcard Purchase

items.title: Safeway: Purchase $75 In Select Giftcards & Get $15 Off Your Next Shopping Order (Home Depot, Disney, & More) [Vons, Randall’s, Albertsons, Tom Thumb, Acme, Jewel, Shaw’s]

items.summary_zh: 在 Safeway 購買 75 美元的指定禮卡，可在下一次訂單中獲得 15 美元的折扣。
items.title_es: Safeway: Compra $75 en tarjetas de regalo seleccionadas y obtén $15 de descuento en tu próximo pedido (Home Depot, Disney y más) [Vons, Randall’s, Albertsons, Tom Thumb, Acme, Jewel, Shaw’s]
items.summary_es: Safeway ofrece $15 de descuento al gastar $75 en tarjetas de regalo seleccionadas.

items.title: 7-Eleven 7NOW App Promo Codes: $10 off $30 With Promo Code USA10

items.title_en: American Express To Nerf Resy Credit (Select Restaurants Only)
